name: python3-swagger-spec-validator
title: python3-swagger-spec-validator
description:
Validation of Swagger specifications (Python3 version)
Swagger Spec Validator is a Python library that validates Swagger Specs
against the Swagger 1.2
(https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-spec/blob/master/versions/1.2.md)
or Swagger 2
(https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-spec/blob/master/versions/2.0.md)
specification.
The validator aims to check for full compliance with the Specification.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-swagger-spec-validator because Validation of Swagger specifications (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-swagger-spec-validator as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-swagger-spec-validator with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-swagger-spec-validator --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
